projects.title: La Cuentita
projects.bodyText:
- Offline-first shared expense manager inspired by **Tricount**.
- Works entirely without internet and synchronizes optionally through a self-hosted backend.
- Uses UUID-based events, idempotent synchronization, and full audit history to prevent data loss and duplicates.
projects.subtitle: Offline-first shared expense manager with optional synchronization and complete auditability.
projects.detailDescription:
- Built around the principle that user data belongs to the device, not the server.
- All operations are persisted locally in **SQLite**, allowing the application to work completely offline.
- Shared groups synchronize asynchronously through a **FastAPI** backend and **PostgreSQL**, while local groups remain fully independent.
- Groups can be converted between local and shared modes by creating independent copies, ensuring no unwanted coupling.
- Synchronization uses UUID-based events and idempotent processing to guarantee duplicate-free retries and robustness against connectivity failures.
- Balances are calculated dynamically instead of being stored, ensuring consistency across devices.
- Maintains a complete activity log and soft-delete history for auditing, debugging, and conflict resolution.
- Supports JSON export/import for backups, migration, and disaster recovery.
- Designed to prioritize reliability, offline availability, and user ownership of data.

projects.title: ARCA + MercadoPago integration
projects.bodyText:
- Automated billing system that listens to **MercadoPago** payment notifications and issues invoices through **ARCA (AFIP)**.
- Notifies via **Telegram** with full payment details — confirm, reject, or postpone with one tap.
- Handles CAE generation, comprobante numbering, and due dates automatically.
projects.subtitle: Automated billing system that connects MercadoPago payments with ARCA (AFIP) invoicing — fully managed from Telegram.
projects.detailDescription:
- Listens to MercadoPago webhook notifications in real time and triggers the invoicing flow automatically.
- Sends a Telegram message with full payment details (amount, payer, concept) and lets you **confirm, reject, or postpone** each invoice with one tap.
- On confirmation, generates the invoice in **ARCA (AFIP)**, obtains the CAE, assigns the comprobante number and due date — all without manual intervention.
- Designed for **freelancers and small businesses** that want to eliminate manual invoicing overhead while staying compliant with Argentine fiscal regulations.
- Built with **FastAPI** for the webhook listener and a separate service for ARCA integration, communicating asynchronously.

projects.title: My network
projects.bodyText:
- Centralize your business relationships for smarter, more agile, and stronger connections.
- Transform the way you manage your business ecosystem by centralizing **prospects**, **clients**, **partners**, and **vendors** into a dynamic, **data-driven** view.
- Gain deeper insights and make **strategic decisions** with ease.
 - **PROPERTY OF CHAINDOTS**

projects.title: StockPic
projects.bodyText:
- An inventory visualization tool that reads stock data from **Excel** or **Google Sheets** and updates corresponding product images with the available stock.
 - Automatically overlays stock numbers on images using **Python Pillow**.
 - Supports batch processing for multiple products and exports updated images to a designated folder.
 - Can be integrated into existing workflows for e-commerce or inventory management.

projects.title: Sales bot
projects.bodyText:
- A Telegram bot that **responds to user commands** and handles interactions seamlessly.
 - Integrated with a **payment gateway** to process transactions securely.
 - Supports automated responses, notifications, and custom workflows for enhanced user experience.

projects.title: Colppy + Hubspot + Powerbi integration
projects.bodyText:
- A workflow integration connecting **Colppy**, **HubSpot**, and **Power BI** to streamline data flow.
 - Automates extraction, transformation, and visualization of financial and CRM data.
 - Enables real-time dashboards and actionable insights for smarter business decisions.

projects.title: Music downloader
projects.bodyText:
- A web application to **download music from YouTube** quickly and efficiently.
 - Supports multiple formats and automatic conversion to **MP3**.
 - Provides a simple, user-friendly interface for seamless downloading.

projects.title: Url life checker
projects.bodyText:
- A web application to **monitor and verify the status** of any given URL.
 - Performs real-time checks and returns **HTTP status codes** with response details.
 - Useful for uptime monitoring, debugging, and ensuring service availability.

projects.title: ai-telegram-bot
projects.bodyText:
- Developed a **Telegram chatbot** for expense tracking with automatic categorization using **AI**.
- Built with two **Python services** working together to provide a seamless expense management experience.
- Enables users to log expenses in real time and receive smart insights for better financial management.

projects.title: social-media-api
projects.bodyText:
- Built a modern, scalable **social media API** using **Django REST Framework**.
- Designed following **SOLID principles** and implemented industry best practices for **enterprise-level applications**.
- Includes features such as authentication, user interactions, and optimized database queries to ensure performance and maintainability.
